subcodes.first_line: O Nabil! Hearken unto the call of thy Glorious Lord from the direction of the Throne, and give ear unto that which the Spirit imparteth unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نبیل اسمع ندآء ربک الجلیل عن جهه العرش ثم استمع ما یلقی الروح علیک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
